title: Subscribers for Automations
excerpt: I noticed that when I work on Custom Automations under Advanced, I see that the “Choose Board Subscribers” This is a great feature but the text of the people we add becomes illegible as we add people. Having this as a sc…

posts.author: Sebastiansmith (Sebastian)
posts.cookedHtml:
I noticed that when I work on Custom Automations under Advanced, I see that the “Choose Board Subscribers” This is a great feature but the text of the people we add becomes illegible as we add people. Having this as a scrolling feature would make it so much easier to use and edit.

Screenshot 2023-03-13 1710511507×889 75.4 KB
